title: BEM-850 execute 849 next
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 21:04 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem849_verify_triad_after_bem848.json')
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
patched=[]
if status_in=='dispatch_result_still_missing' or 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
    txt=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
    proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
    if proc.exists():
        pt=proc.read_text(errors='ignore')
        if 'summary.status.json' not in pt:
            pt=pt.replace('echo "processed_queue_items=$count"', 'printf \'{"status":"processor_completed","processed_queue_items":%s,"time":"%s"}\\n\' "$count" "$now" > governance/workflow_dispatch_results/summary.status.json\necho "processed_queue_items=$count"')
            proc.write_text(pt)
            patched.append(str(proc))
    commit=Path('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh')
    if commit.exists():
        ct=commit.read_text(errors='ignore')
        if 'governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid' not in ct:
            ct=ct.replace('governance/workflow_dispatch_results', 'governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/workflow_dispatch_queue governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid')
            commit.write_text(ct)
            patched.append(str(commit))
    if runner.exists() and 'Process workflow dispatch queue' not in txt:
        insert='''\n      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue\n        if: always()\n        env:\n          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}\n        run: bash scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh\n      - name: Commit workflow dispatch queue results\n        if: always()\n        run: bash scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh\n'''
        marker='      - name: Complete job'
        if marker in txt:
            txt=txt.replace(marker,insert+marker,1)
        else:
            txt=txt+insert
        runner.write_text(txt)
        patched.append(str(runner))
    status='dispatch_result_pipeline_patched_or_confirmed'
    next_action='create fresh queue item, tick, verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif status_in=='runtime_still_missing' or 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='runtime_state_repair_selected'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher runtime state writer'
elif status_in=='real_response_still_missing' or 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    status='response_writer_repair_selected'
    next_action='patch Claude response writer/action prompt'
elif status_in=='triad_pass':
    status='triad_pass_protocol_next'
    next_action='process real Claude response into agreed protocol'
else:
    status='unknown_next_action'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-849 state'
state={'bem':'BEM-850','status':status,'bem849_status':status_in,'missing':missing,'patched':patched,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem850_execute_bem849_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem850_execute_bem849_next.md').write_text('# BEM-850 | Execute BEM-849 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-850'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem850_execute_bem849_next.json','governance/reports/bem850_execute_bem849_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+patched
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-849 next action by patching or confirming dispatch result pipeline, or routing to runtime/response repair')
"""
No issue comments.
